inputs.label: Tool Price
inputs.businessContext: Purchase cost of the cutting tool. Based on supplier pricing and ISO 9001 procurement standards.

inputs.label: Tool Life (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Expected usable life of the tool under standard conditions. Derived from manufacturer specifications and Taylor's tool life equation.

inputs.label: Number of Regrinds
inputs.businessContext: How many times the tool can be reground. Based on tool geometry and regrinding best practices.

inputs.label: Cost per Regrind
inputs.businessContext: Cost of each regrinding operation. Includes labor and consumables.

inputs.label: Machine Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly cost of the CNC machine including depreciation, energy, and maintenance. Based on standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Cutting Time per Part
inputs.businessContext: Actual cutting time per part. Determined by machining parameters and part geometry.

inputs.label: Tool Change Time
inputs.businessContext: Time to replace or index the tool. Includes setup and alignment.

inputs.label: Parts per Tool Change
inputs.businessContext: Number of parts produced before a tool change is needed. Based on tool life and cutting time.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Affects adjustment factor for risk analysis.

thresholds.toolWearCostPerPart: > 5: 'High tool wear cost per part, consider optimizing parameters or tool selection'
thresholds.toolLife: < 30: 'Short tool life, investigate cutting conditions or tool quality'

suggestedActions: toolWearCostPerPart > 5 ? 'Reduce cutting speed or feed rate to extend tool life' : null
toolLife < 30 ? 'Consider using a more durable tool material or coating' : null
regrinds > 0 && regrindCost > toolPrice * 0.3 ? 'Evaluate regrinding vs. new tool cost' : null
